members.name: AddStream
members.signature: public void AddStream(int index, AudioStream stream, float weight)
members.summary: Insert a stream at the specified index. If the index is less than zero, the insertion occurs at the end of the underlying pool.

members.name: GetStream
members.summary: Returns the stream at the specified index.

members.name: GetStreamProbabilityWeight
members.summary: Returns the probability weight associated with the stream at the given index.

members.name: MoveStream
members.signature: public void MoveStream(int indexFrom, int indexTo)
members.summary: Move a stream from one index to another.

members.name: RemoveStream
members.summary: Remove the stream at the specified index.

members.name: SetStream
members.signature: public void SetStream(int index, AudioStream stream)
members.summary: Set the AudioStream at the specified index.

members.name: SetStreamProbabilityWeight
members.signature: public void SetStreamProbabilityWeight(int index, float weight)
members.summary: Set the probability weight of the stream at the specified index. The higher this value, the more likely that the randomizer will choose this stream during random playback modes.

members.name: PlaybackMode
members.summary: Controls how this AudioStreamRandomizer picks which AudioStream to play next.

members.name: RandomPitch
members.summary: The largest possible frequency multiplier of the random pitch variation. Pitch will be randomly chosen within a range of [code skip-lint]1.0 / random_pitch[/code] and [code skip-lint]random_pitch[/code]. A value of [code]1.0[/code] means no variation. A value of [code]2.0[/code] means pitch will be randomized between double and half. [b]Note:[/b] Setting this property also sets [member random_pitch_semitones].

members.name: RandomPitchSemitones
members.summary: The largest possible distance, in semitones, of the random pitch variation. A value of [code]0.0[/code] means no variation. [b]Note:[/b] Setting this property also sets [member random_pitch].

members.name: RandomVolumeOffsetDb
members.summary: The intensity of random volume variation. Volume will be increased or decreased by a random value up to [code skip-lint]random_volume_offset_db[/code]. A value of [code]0.0[/code] means no variation. A value of [code]3.0[/code] means volume will be randomized between [code]-3.0 dB[/code] and [code]+3.0 dB[/code].

members.name: StreamsCount
members.summary: The number of streams in the stream pool.

rawMembers.name: stream_{index}/stream
rawMembers.summary: The [AudioStream] at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. streams_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: stream_{index}/weight
rawMembers.summary: The probability weight of the [AudioStream] at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. streams_count - 1[/code] range.

values.name: PLAYBACK_RANDOM
values.summary: Pick a stream at random according to the probability weights chosen for each stream. If only 1 sound is present in the pool, the same sound will always play.

values.name: PLAYBACK_RANDOM_NO_REPEATS
values.summary: Pick a stream at random according to the probability weights chosen for each stream, but avoid playing the same stream twice in a row whenever possible. If only 1 sound is present in the pool, the same sound will always play, effectively allowing repeats to occur.

values.name: PLAYBACK_SEQUENTIAL
values.summary: Play streams in the order they appear in the stream pool. If only 1 sound is present in the pool, the same sound will always play.

constants.name: PLAYBACK_RANDOM_NO_REPEATS
constants.summary: Pick a stream at random according to the probability weights chosen for each stream, but avoid playing the same stream twice in a row whenever possible. If only 1 sound is present in the pool, the same sound will always play, effectively allowing repeats to occur.

constants.name: PLAYBACK_RANDOM
constants.summary: Pick a stream at random according to the probability weights chosen for each stream. If only 1 sound is present in the pool, the same sound will always play.

constants.name: PLAYBACK_SEQUENTIAL
constants.summary: Play streams in the order they appear in the stream pool. If only 1 sound is present in the pool, the same sound will always play.
